name: Design gap
about: A generated design missed something an enterprise architect would catch

## The use case given to agentify

## What the generated design said

## What it should have said

## Which part of the enterprise bar was missed

- [ ] Requirements / NFR elicitation
- [ ] Pattern selection (escalated too far, or not far enough)
- [ ] Component justification / scaling model / failure mode
- [ ] Security, identity, or tenant isolation
- [ ] Evaluation plan
- [ ] Observability
- [ ] Latency / cost math
- [ ] Rollout phasing
- [ ] Citation quality
